task_completion.description: The agent loaded the CT scan and navigated to the superior liver region showing the IVC confluence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slicer interface showing the Red slice view (axial) focused on the liver dome and the cross-section of the Inferior Vena Cava (IVC).

task_completion.description: Three distinct fiducial markers are placed at the ostia of the hepatic veins where they enter the IVC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slicer 2D or 3D views showing three control points/markers positioned around the IVC at the hepatic vein entry points.

task_completion.description: The placed markers are explicitly labeled as RHV, MHV, and LHV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Markups module table or annotations in the 3D/2D views displaying the labels 'RHV', 'MHV', and 'LHV'.

task_completion.description: The agent created a structured report containing distance measurements and anatomical pattern classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or Slicer Python console showing a JSON structure with keys such as 'rhv_to_mhv_distance_mm', 'anatomical_pattern', and 'right_hepatic_vein'.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the markup file, screenshot, and JSON report to the correct locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window showing 'hepatic_vein_markups.mrk.json', 'hepatic_confluence.png', and 'hepatic_vein_report.json' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/' subdirectories.

integrity.description: The agent utilized the 3D Slicer GUI (Markups module, slice navigation) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Slicer application window with active interaction (e.g., mouse cursor, highlighted buttons, active views).

integrity.description: The agent did not simply paste a pre-written report without interacting with the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The timeline shows data interaction and marker placement occurring before the report generation.

integrity.description: The task was performed within the actual 3D Slicer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly displays the 3D Slicer interface elements and branding.
